concerns.text: FR-010 defines calibration success as RMSE *difference* across conditions ≤0.02, while SC-007 specifies absolute RMSE ≤0.15. These are different metrics for the same step. Clarify whether both thresholds must be satisfied or if one supersedes the other.
SC-003 states 'CI confidence-interval width' — 'CI' is ambiguous (confidence interval vs. continuous integration). Use '95% confidence-interval width' for clarity.

SC-005 requires 'no gaps larger than 5s' in response time distribution but does not define the binning method or gap measurement procedure. Specify how gaps are detected (e.g., histogram bin width, consecutive empty bins).
